simpleVerify.name: Verify label (idle)
simpleVerify.description: Text shown next to the shield before verification starts.

simpleVerifying.name: Verify label (in progress)
simpleVerifying.description: Text shown while the proof-of-work and Cap redeem are running.

brandName.name: Brand wordmark
brandName.description: Product name shown next to the leaf logo in the brand block.

brandTag.name: Brand tagline
brandTag.description: Small tagline under the wordmark linking to the legal page.

simpleAriaCheckbox.name: Checkbox aria-label
simpleAriaCheckbox.description: Screen-reader label for the clickable verify shield. Used when trigger=click.

simpleAriaStatus.name: Status aria-label
simpleAriaStatus.description: Screen-reader label for the non-interactive status shield. Used for auto / form-submit triggers.

overlayClose.name: Close button aria-label
overlayClose.description: Screen-reader label for the close (x) button on the fullscreen game dialog.

frameTitle.name: Challenge frame title
frameTitle.description: Accessible name (title attribute) for the iframe running the challenge game. Announced when a screen reader enters the frame.

German.simpleAriaCheckbox: Bestätige, dass du ein Mensch bist

Japanese.simpleAriaCheckbox: 人間であることを確認

primary.name: Primary action
primary.description: Verify button, shield verified state, focus outline, brand link colors.

primary_hover.name: Primary hover
primary_hover.description: Darker variant of primary used on hover for brand links.

surface_bg.name: Surface background
surface_bg.description: Card / dialog background. Frames the verify checkbox and game dialog.

text_primary.name: Primary text
text_primary.description: Verify checkbox text, close button text.

text_label.name: State label
text_label.description: The Verify / Verifying / Verified / Failed label color.

text_muted.name: Muted text
text_muted.description: Brand tag, shield outline in interactive idle state, separator dots.

text_passive.name: Passive text
text_passive.description: Shield outline in passive (auto / form-submit) idle state.

separator.name: Compact separator
separator.description: Color of the dot separator (·) injected between the brand wordmark and tag in compact-mode brand strips. Sits lighter than text_muted so the dot reads as decoration, not active text.

border.name: Border
border.description: Card outline, frame divider, badge slot divider.

glyph.name: Glyph
glyph.description: Checkmark / error glyph fill rendered on top of the shield.

error.name: Error
error.description: Shield stroke + fill when verification fails.

shadow.name: Modal shadow
shadow.description: Drop shadow on the modal dialog.

modal_backdrop.name: Modal backdrop
modal_backdrop.description: Backdrop wash behind the modal dialog.

fullscreen_backdrop.name: Fullscreen backdrop
fullscreen_backdrop.description: Backdrop wash behind the fullscreen dialog.

close_btn_bg.name: Close button bg
close_btn_bg.description: Background of the close (x) button on the fullscreen dialog.

brand_text.name: Brand text
brand_text.description: Color of the Caputchin wordmark + home link in the brand strip. Pairs with brand_logo so wordmark + leaf match.

brand_text_hover.name: Brand text hover
brand_text_hover.description: Color of the brand wordmark + tag links on hover/focus.

brand_logo.name: Brand logo
brand_logo.description: Leaf monogram rendered at the start of the brand strip. Asset must match the skin mode (light/dark variant).

home_link.name: Brand home link
home_link.description: External URL the leaf + Caputchin wordmark in the brand strip links to.

legal_link.name: Brand legal link
legal_link.description: External URL the small tagline under the wordmark links to. Typically the privacy / legal page.
